name: @graffiticode/l0176-monorepo
description: L0176 — a Graffiticode dialect (first child of L0000)

scripts.build: npm run -w packages/core build && npm run -w packages/core build-static && npm run -w packages/api build && npm run -w packages/view build && npm run -w packages/view build:embed && npm run assemble
scripts.assemble: shx rm -rf packages/api/static && shx mkdir -p packages/api/static && shx cp -r packages/core/dist/static/. packages/api/static/ && shx cp -r packages/view/dist-embed/. packages/api/static/
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm -w packages/view pack
scripts.publish: npm -w packages/core publish --access=public && npm -w packages/view publish --access=public
scripts.gcp:build: gcloud builds submit --project graffiticode --config cloudbuild.yaml --substitutions=COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'latest')
scripts.gcp:deploy: gcloud run deploy l0176 --project graffiticode --source . --port 50176 --region us-central1 --platform managed --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.gcp:logs: gcloud run logs read l0176 --project graffiticode --region us-central1
